code.code:
# Find all '>' positions in the current map
map_lines = obs.split('--- MAP ---')[1].split('--- STATUS ---')[0].strip().split('\n')
stairs_positions = []
for row_idx, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    for col_idx, char in enumerate(line):
        if char == '>':
            stairs_positions.append((col_idx, row_idx))
print("Stairs positions (x, y):", stairs_positions)

# Find player position and stairs
player_pos = (10, 3)
print("Player at:", player_pos)

# If stairs exist, try to move toward them
if stairs_positions:
    # Find closest stairs
    closest = min(stairs_positions, key=lambda p: (p[0]-player_pos[0])**2 + (p[1]-player_pos[1])**2)
    print("Closest stairs:", closest)
else:
    print("No stairs visible on map")

# Check what's under player
print("Under player:", nh.under_player)

code.code:
# Search for down-stairs and check map for '>' character
map_lines = obs.split('--- MAP ---')[1].split('--- STATUS ---')[0].strip().split('\n')
for y, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    if '>' in line:
        x = line.index('>')
        print(f"Found down-stairs > at map position x={x}, y={y}")
        print(f"Line: {line}")

# If no '>' found, search the current tile to reveal hidden doors/stairs
adjacent = obs.split('--- ADJACENT ---')[1].split('---')[0].strip() if '--- ADJACENT ---' in obs else ''
print(f"\nAdjacent info: {adjacent}")
print(f"\nUnder player: {nh.under_player}")

# Search for hidden stairs near current position
print("Searching for hidden down-stairs...")
nh.search()
